final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing cinematic still of a post-apocalyptic wasteland scene with a modified armored vehicle in a desolate desert.

Style/medium: photorealistic digital matte painting, Mad Max-inspired post-apocalyptic aesthetic, gritty survivalist atmosphere
Composition: wide establishing shot, 24mm lens, low horizon line with vehicle positioned in lower third, collapsed city ruins in distant background
Subject: heavily modified armored vehicle with welded metal plates, rusted bodywork, mounted weapons or tools, weathered and battle-worn
Scene/backdrop: vast desolate desert landscape, collapsed skyscrapers and ruined city structures on the horizon, dust storms visible in distance
Lighting/mood: hazy overcast sky with diffused amber-yellow light, dust particles catching light, oppressive and tense survival atmosphere
Color palette: muted ochre and sand as base, sickly yellow-brown sky, rust orange accents on vehicle, desaturated overall with warm undertones
Materials/textures: fine wind-blown sand, corroded metal with peeling paint, cracked concrete ruins, swirling dust clouds
Avoid: clean pristine surfaces, bright saturated colors, fantasy elements, zombies or monsters, lens flare abuse, 8K stuffer labels
